news.title:
Axis Securities warns of margin pressure on HUL, Dabur, Asian Paints due to rising crude and input costs.
FMCG, paints, QSR, and retail sectors face cost shocks; Jubilant FoodWorks, Trent, and V-Mart most vulnerable.
news.summary:
Axis Securities warns of margin pressure on HUL, Dabur, Asian Paints due to rising crude and input costs.
FMCG, paints, QSR, and retail sectors face cost shocks; Jubilant FoodWorks, Trent, and V-Mart most vulnerable.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks renews India franchise for 15 years with 10-year extension option.
Exclusive rights for Domino's in Sri Lanka and Bangladesh also renewed.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks renews India franchise for 15 years with 10-year extension option.
Exclusive rights for Domino's in Sri Lanka and Bangladesh also renewed.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks exits Dunkin’ Doughnuts due to weak financials; segment contributed 0.61% to revenue with Rs 191 Cr loss.
Focus shifts to Domino's, a high-return core business; company sees no material impact on operations from this exit.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks exits Dunkin’ Doughnuts due to weak financials; segment contributed 0.61% to revenue with Rs 191 Cr loss.
Focus shifts to Domino's, a high-return core business; company sees no material impact on operations from this exit.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight rating on Jubilant FoodWorks.
Target price for Jubilant FoodWorks set at Rs 693 by Morgan Stanley.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight rating on Jubilant FoodWorks.
Target price for Jubilant FoodWorks set at Rs 693 by Morgan Stanley.

news.title: Jubilant FoodWorks plans to exit the Dunkin India business post-2026.
news.summary: Jubilant FoodWorks plans to exit the Dunkin India business post-2026.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks' board approved non-renewal of Dunkin' brand franchise agreement post-December 2026.
The decision will not materially impact the company's financial or operational performance.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks' board approved non-renewal of Dunkin' brand franchise agreement post-December 2026.
The decision will not materially impact the company's financial or operational performance.

news.title:
Jubilant Food shares fell over 3% in early trade due to LPG shortage.
Operational constraints at some stores impacted trading performance.
news.summary:
Jubilant Food shares fell over 3% in early trade due to LPG shortage.
Operational constraints at some stores impacted trading performance.

news.title:
JPMorgan retains neutral on Jubilant FoodWorks, cutting TP to Rs 500 citing LPG disruption.
FY27 revenue/EBITDA estimates reduced by 2%/7% amid rising West Asia conflict uncertainty.
news.summary:
JPMorgan retains neutral on Jubilant FoodWorks, cutting TP to Rs 500 citing LPG disruption.
FY27 revenue/EBITDA estimates reduced by 2%/7% amid rising West Asia conflict uncertainty.

news.title:
Brokerages spotlight HDFC Bank, Jubilant FoodWorks, Eicher Motors, and ONGC. HDFC Bank garners 'Buy' ratings for strong ROE and valuations.
Eicher Motors upgraded to 'Neutral,' ONGC retains 'Overweight,' and Jubilant faces LPG challenges. RBI forex cap may hit large banks' Q4 earnings.
news.summary:
Brokerages spotlight HDFC Bank, Jubilant FoodWorks, Eicher Motors, and ONGC. HDFC Bank garners 'Buy' ratings for strong ROE and valuations.
Eicher Motors upgraded to 'Neutral,' ONGC retains 'Overweight,' and Jubilant faces LPG challenges. RBI forex cap may hit large banks' Q4 earnings.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks faces operational limits at some stores due to LPG shortage.
Aarti Pharma gets one US FDA Form 483 observation for Unit IV.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks faces operational limits at some stores due to LPG shortage.
Aarti Pharma gets one US FDA Form 483 observation for Unit IV.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks faces LPG supply issues due to Middle East geopolitical tensions.
The company is managing by switching to electricity, PNG, and engaging with suppliers.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks faces LPG supply issues due to Middle East geopolitical tensions.

news.title: Jubilant FoodWorks reports operational constraints in some Domino's stores due to LPG shortage.
news.summary: Jubilant FoodWorks reports operational constraints in some Domino's stores due to LPG shortage.

news.title: Jubilant Foodworks announces a change in senior management.
news.summary: Jubilant Foodworks announces a change in senior management.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks' EVP Gaurav Pande resigns, last working day March 31, 2026.
Resignation due to external opportunity; details available on company's website.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks' EVP Gaurav Pande resigns, last working day March 31, 2026.
Resignation due to external opportunity; details available on company's website.

news.title:
Food delivery stocks like Eternal, Swiggy, Jubilant Foodworks fell up to 5% amid LPG crisis caused by Iran-US war.
Restaurants face closures, rising costs, and reduced menus, impacting food delivery platforms reliant on partnerships.
news.summary:
Food delivery stocks like Eternal, Swiggy, Jubilant Foodworks fell up to 5% amid LPG crisis caused by Iran-US war.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks begins commercial production at its new Raigad commissary.
This move aims to improve supply chain efficiency and support expansion plans.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks begins commercial production at its new Raigad commissary.
This move aims to improve supply chain efficiency and support expansion plans.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks, Westlife, Sapphire face risks as LPG shortage disrupts QSR operations, raising costs and impacting margins.
Jubilant FoodWorks shares fell 0.73% to Rs 477.95; QSR chains like Domino's and KFC face reduced revenue and partial shutdowns.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks, Westlife, Sapphire face risks as LPG shortage disrupts QSR operations, raising costs and impacting margins.

news.title: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 4,950,250 shares of Jubilant Foodworks at Rs 519.67.
news.summary: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 4,950,250 shares of Jubilant Foodworks at Rs 519.67.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks shared insights at Feb 24 investor conference, highlighting its 3,600 global stores.
Focus areas include growth potential in Indian QSR market, tech innovation, and AI for efficiency.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks sold its 31.66% stake in Hashtag Loyalty Pvt Ltd.
The sale was completed on Feb 20, 2026; Hashtag is no longer an associate.
